_meta.description: Static fund data maintained manually. Update monthly after AMC factsheets are published (typically by the 10th of each month).

fields.aum_cr: AUM in crores -- source: AMFI monthly AAUM report or fund factsheet
fields.expense_ratio: Direct plan TER (%) -- source: AMC website or SEBI TER disclosure
fields.managers: Fund manager list -- source: AMC factsheet or website
fields.style: Investment style -- source: AMC factsheet / Morningstar style box
fields.concentration: Portfolio concentration -- source: AMC monthly factsheet
